description: Machine-readable descriptor of the three EarthSciIO extensibility registries. Each registry is a name->implementation lookup. New backends register under a new name WITHOUT touching the Provider API. 'active' entries ship now; 'stub' entries are registered now (exercised via the registries by esio-9nb.8) and implemented later. The Provider depends only on the three interfaces named here.

transport.purpose: Fetch a resolved URL's bytes into the cache (conditional GET, auth, mirror failover). Bypassed entirely in offline mode.

entries.name: file
entries.notes: Expands ${EARTHSCIDATADIR} inside file:// templates; local copy into cache.

entries.name: cds
entries.notes: Copernicus CDS API v1: cds://<dataset>?<canonical-request-json> is submitted (POST .../execution), the job is polled to completion, and the result asset href is downloaded into the cache. Auth via the 'cds' realm (PRIVATE-TOKEN from ~/.cdsapirc or $CDSAPI_KEY).

entries.name: s3
entries.notes: Anonymous object GET: rewrites s3://<bucket>/<key> to regional virtual-hosted HTTPS (https://<bucket>.s3.<region>.amazonaws.com/<key>, region default us-east-2 via $EARTHSCI_S3_REGION/$AWS_REGION) and delegates to the http transport. No AWS SDK / SigV4; the s3:// URL stays canonical in the cache key + manifest.

format.purpose: Open a cached blob and return CF-decoded native-grid arrays keyed by file_variable. Does NOT remap variable names or apply unit_conversion (those stay in ESS).

entries.name: netcdf
entries.notes: CF decode: scale_factor/add_offset, _FillValue->NaN, time units/calendar retained raw.

entries.name: geotiff
entries.notes: Raster bands via GDAL; Python ships first, Julia/Rust may lag (R5). No binary fixture committed yet (no GDAL/git-lfs here).

entries.name: csv
entries.notes: Points readers: numeric columns->float64 1-D arrays, others->string.

entries.name: zarr
entries.notes: Store-backed Zarr v2 reader: parses per-array .zarray/.zattrs (no consolidated .zmetadata), fetches ONLY the chunk objects a lazy orthogonal selection intersects (each chunk its own object, keyed by sha256(object_url)), blosc/lz4+shuffle decode, C-order unpack, <f4/<f8 -> float64, dims from _ARRAY_DIMENSIONS, no coordinate arrays. fill_value is NOT mapped to NaN.

store.purpose: Physical home of the content-addressed cache (blobs/meta/locks). Realizes the cache layout; the cache key (sha256(resolved_url)) is store-independent.

entries.name: local
entries.notes: $EARTHSCIDATADIR filesystem: blobs/<key[:2]>/<key>.<ext>, meta/<key>.json, locks/<key>.lock, tmp/<uuid>.part. flock advisory lock + atomic rename.

entries.name: s3
entries.notes: Object-store backend (key->object). Conditional PUT / If-None-Match as the lock analog. Registered as a stub.
